methodology: edge-walk + fractal analysis, 3 retrieval modes traced, 6 parallel agents

tier_1_full: Feedback loop attenuation (auth/state: complex bidirectional state machine)
Importance scoring formula (data integrity: determines memory survival)
Interference detection (data integrity: silent memory degradation)
tier_2_standard: RRF fusion pipeline (high coupling: 6 layers of scoring)
Hook event capture (external integration: Claude Code <-> shodh API)
Adaptive weight learning (complex state: EMA convergence over 100+ cycles)
LTP system (complex state: 4-level hierarchy with temporal pattern detection)
tier_3_light: LOG_PERIODIC_SCALES runtime config (low coupling: isolated decay function)

boundary_details.name: Hook -> API (remember)
boundary_details.data_crossing: content(1000ch), type, tags, emotional_valence/arousal, episode_id, sequence_number, preceding_memory_id
boundary_details.failure_mode: Backend unreachable -> stale cache served with age warning
boundary_details.attack_surface: Content injection via prompt text, but sanitized by strip_system_noise

hazop.NO: Hook never fires -> no memories stored, no feedback loop. Impact: total amnesia per session
hazop.MORE: Rapid tool use -> 50+ actions buffered, oldest evicted. Impact: early actions lost
hazop.LESS: Short prompts (<10 char) -> skipped entirely. Impact: quick commands not remembered
hazop.REVERSE: Misleading memories surfaced -> negative EMA momentum. Latency: 5-15 cycles to suppress
hazop.PART_OF: Content truncated to 1000 chars -> reasoning tail lost. Impact: 95% intent loss for long prompts
hazop.OTHER_THAN: Hook sends FileAccess when intent was architectural decision. Impact: importance=0.05 instead of 0.30
hazop.EARLY: Proactive context before embedding ready -> BM25-only retrieval. Impact: semantic search misses
hazop.LATE: 50ms auto-ingest timeout -> memory abandoned. Impact: majority of auto-ingested memories at risk

fmea.notes: Every FileAccess memory is truncated to 'Modified file: X'. Happens on every edit.

boundary_details.name: Hook -> API (proactive_context)
boundary_details.data_crossing: context(1000ch), max_results, thresholds, auto_ingest, previous_response, user_followup, surfaced_memory_ids, tool_actions, rrf_k
boundary_details.control_flow: Request-response, 5s timeout, degraded to stale cache on failure
boundary_details.failure_mode: Stale context served with age warning; single-line degradation warning on total failure

hazop.NO: Backend down -> no surfacing, no feedback, no auto-ingest. Impact: Claude operates without memory
hazop.REVERSE: surfaced_memory_ids from cycle N fed back in cycle N+1. If N had wrong memories, feedback penalizes them
hazop.PART_OF: Only top 3-5 memories returned, but 100 candidates scored internally. Claude sees 3-5% of considered memories

boundary_details.name: API -> semantic_retrieve (Query struct)
boundary_details.data_crossing: query_text, query_embedding, max_results, retrieval_mode, rrf_k, recency_weight, episode_id, prospective_signals, filters
boundary_details.contract: Query struct (25+ fields, most Optional, 2 defaults)

hazop.NO: query_embedding fails -> text-only BM25 search. Impact: semantic search disabled, keyword-only
hazop.MORE: max_results=250 -> 250*8=2000 vector candidates searched. Impact: latency spike
hazop.LESS: rrf_k=1.0 -> winner-take-all. Impact: only rank-1 from each signal survives fusion

boundary_details.name: Layer 2 (Graph) activation gate
boundary_details.data_crossing: retrieval_mode enum checked against {Hybrid, Associative, Causal}
boundary_details.failure_mode: mode=semantic -> graph completely skipped, empty graph_results
boundary_details.fractal_check: Pattern matches: each layer has a boolean activation gate. Graph, BM25, Reranking, Ontology all have skip conditions. Self-similar at all scales.

hazop.OTHER_THAN: mode=semantic but query is relationship-oriented -> graph results would help but are skipped

boundary_details.name: Layer 4 RRF fusion (K parameter)
boundary_details.data_crossing: query.rrf_k -> local k variable. Graph density -> density_weights. Query type -> weight modulation.
boundary_details.contract: k clamped 1.0-200.0, density interpolated 0.1-0.5, query_type shifts +/-0.10-0.12
boundary_details.fractal_check: RRF formula weight/(k+rank) repeats at 3 scales: decomposed sub-query (DECOMP_RRF_K=20), main fusion (k=query.rrf_k), and HybridSearch.rrf_k=45. Pattern consistent but K values differ.

hazop.NO: graph_density=None -> defaults (0.6, 0.3, 0.1). Impact: graph gets 0.3 even with zero graph results
hazop.MORE: rrf_k=200 -> all ranks nearly equal. Impact: top-1 result gets only 0.5% more than rank-100
hazop.LESS: rrf_k=1.0 -> rank-1 gets 50%, rank-2 gets 33%. Impact: extreme winner-take-all

boundary_details.name: Layer 5 unified scoring
boundary_details.data_crossing: rrf_score, hebbian_strength, hours_since_creation, emotional_arousal, credibility, temporal_refs, feedback_momentum
boundary_details.contract: Additive formula: base + recency + arousal(5%) + credibility(10%) + temporal(25%) * feedback_multiplier(-20% to +10%)
boundary_details.fractal_check: Each sub-score follows the same pattern: threshold -> scaling -> additive contribution. Consistent.

hazop.REVERSE: feedback_momentum < -0.3 -> 20% suppression. But coactivated memories resist unlearning.
hazop.LATE: Feedback from cycle N doesn't affect cycle N retrieval. Always 1-cycle latency.

boundary_details.name: Feedback circuit: proactive_context -> FeedbackStore
boundary_details.control_flow: 7-stage pipeline: entity_overlap -> semantic_sim -> tool_attribution -> info_attribution -> negative_keywords -> combined_signal -> EMA_update
boundary_details.failure_mode: Low entity overlap + low semantic sim -> weak signal (-0.1). Requires 5-15 cycles to accumulate meaningful momentum.
boundary_details.contract: Signal range [-1.0, +1.0], confidence [0.0, 1.0], EMA learning rate adaptive 0.1-1.0

hazop.NO: No previous_response sent -> no feedback processing. Impact: entire feedback loop disabled
hazop.LESS: Tool actions truncated to 200 chars -> contextual detail lost. Impact: 60% signal attenuation
hazop.LATE: Feedback from cycle N processed in cycle N+1. Unlearning latency: 5-15 cycles minimum.

fmea.notes: Positive coactivation history (L2 edge) keeps importance high even under negative feedback

boundary_details.name: Adaptive weight learning
boundary_details.control_flow: EMA update: new_w = (1-lr)*old + lr*target, then normalize to sum=1.0

hazop.LESS: Under 10 feedback events -> learned weights have zero influence. Impact: pure static defaults for first 10 cycles
hazop.LATE: Learning rate 0.05 -> 200+ cycles for significant weight shift. Impact: effectively static for short sessions

boundary_details.name: Memory importance formula -> tier promotion
boundary_details.data_crossing: type_score + richness + entity_count + context + metadata + embedding_quality + content_quality -> importance (0.0-0.95)
boundary_details.contract: Working->Session: importance>=0.35 AND age>=30min. Session->LongTerm: importance>=0.50 AND age>=24h
boundary_details.fractal_check: Same structure as edge tier promotion: threshold + time = advance. Consistent at edge and memory scales.

hazop.OTHER_THAN: FileAccess memory gets importance=0.05, but it's a critical security fix. Formula ignores reasoning intent.

fmea.failure: Importance formula insensitive to Claude's reasoning quality
fmea.notes: Structural: formula uses word_count, entity_count, type — never actual semantic importance

boundary_details.name: LTP detection -> decay protection
boundary_details.data_crossing: activation_count, activation_timestamps, edge_strength, entity_confidence -> LtpStatus enum
boundary_details.control_flow: PIPE-5 readiness model: count_score*0.5 + strength_score*0.5 + tag_bonus >= 1.0
boundary_details.contract: Burst: 5+/24h. Weekly: 3+/week for 2+ weeks. Full: readiness >= 1.0

hazop.NO: Claude never sees LTP status. Cannot know which edges are protected. Impact: blind to memory fragility.
hazop.EARLY: Burst LTP triggered by rapid access but edge is low-quality. Impact: 48h false protection.

boundary_details.name: Interference detection (retroactive/proactive)
boundary_details.data_crossing: cosine_similarity between new and existing memories, importance comparison
boundary_details.control_flow: similarity > 0.65 AND (age < 72h OR old_importance < new_importance) -> decay old memory
boundary_details.contract: Retroactive decay: 0.2 * interference_strength. Proactive decay: 0.15 * interference_strength * (old_importance - 0.5)

hazop.NO: Claude stores contradictory info. Impact: silent 5-10% importance decay on older memory.
hazop.REVERSE: Old high-importance memory proactively suppresses new correction. Impact: corrections start 5% weaker.

fmea.failure: Contradictory memory silently degrades correct older memory
fmea.notes: Highest RPN. Claude has no way to know interference occurred or which memory was damaged.

boundary_details.name: Dream replay -> weak edge creation
boundary_details.data_crossing: random memory pair, cosine similarity in [0.55, 0.85] band -> RelatedTo edge with confidence 0.2

hazop.OTHER_THAN: Claude traverses dream-replay edge believing it's a real learned association. Impact: false memory trails.

boundary_details.name: Context injection (shodh-memory tags -> Claude's attention)
boundary_details.data_crossing: Top 3-5 memories formatted as score% + relative_time + first_120_chars
boundary_details.contract: Injected before user prompt as <shodh-memory> XML block

hazop.PART_OF: 120 char truncation loses most memory content. Claude sees 5-10% of stored information.
hazop.MORE: 5 memories * 120 chars = 600 chars of context. Claude's 1M window barely notices.

boundary_details.name: Log-periodic decay scales (runtime config)
boundary_details.data_crossing: ServerConfig.log_periodic_scales -> OnceLock<Vec<f64>> -> active_scales() in decay functions
boundary_details.contract: SHODH_LOG_PERIODIC_SCALES env var, comma-separated, 1.0-730.0 per scale

hazop.NO: Env var not set -> falls back to compile-time [7.0, 30.0, 365.0]. Impact: no change from current behavior.
hazop.OTHER_THAN: Scales set to [14.0, 60.0, 365.0] but user has weekly patterns. Impact: weekly resonance lost.

phase_2_fractal_atam.core_pattern: Threshold-gated promotion with exponential decay and periodic reinforcement
phase_2_fractal_atam.macro_consistency: Memory tiers (Working->Session->LongTerm) mirror edge tiers (L1->L2->L3->LTP) mirror trust weights (0.2->0.5->0.8->0.95). Self-similar across 4 scales.
phase_2_fractal_atam.meso_consistency: RRF formula weight/(k+rank) used at 3 points with different K values (20, 45, query-configurable). Pattern holds but K inconsistency is a design smell.
phase_2_fractal_atam.micro_consistency: Learning rates cascade: 0.005 (maintenance) -> 0.02 (reconsolidation) -> 0.025 (Hebbian) -> 0.05 (adaptive) -> 0.10 (LTP). Product with event frequency ~constant.

breaks.description: HybridSearchConfig.rrf_k defaults to 45.0 but Layer 4 in semantic_retrieve uses 20.0 (now query-configurable). Two RRF systems with different K semantics.

Claude has rich internal state (tool sequences, reasoning chains, confidence levels) that maps to ~5% of shodh's parameter space. Shodh has rich internal state (LTP, edge tiers, interference events, dream replay) that Claude cannot observe at all.
Positive coactivation: 2-3 cycles. Negative unlearning: 10-20 cycles. Creates hysteresis where bad associations persist 5-10x longer than they should.

tradeoffs: Simplicity (hook content = filename) vs. Richness (full reasoning capture) — chosen simplicity for latency
Safety (MAX_BLEND=0.60 caps learned weights) vs. Responsiveness (could learn faster) — chosen safety
Density-adaptive weighting (auto) vs. Per-query control — chosen auto for robustness
Silent interference (auto-decay old) vs. Explicit conflict resolution (ask user) — chosen silent

challenges.adversary_argument: The hook layer sends 'Modified file: X' but shodh's importance formula scores FileAccess at 0.05. A critical security fix gets the same importance as a typo fix. The importance formula and the hook content are structurally incapable of capturing intent.
challenges.evidence: src/memory/mod.rs importance formula uses word_count + entity_count + type_weight. FileAccess type_weight = 0.05. No mechanism to override.
challenges.verdict: REDUCED to 4.2 — structural incoherence between Claude's reasoning capability and shodh's scoring model

challenges.adversary_argument: The feedback circuit requires 5-15 cycles to suppress a misleading memory. In daily sessions, that's 1-3 weeks of wrong information being surfaced.
challenges.evidence: hooks/memory-hook.ts EMA momentum with lr=0.1, starting ema=0.3, signal=-0.5. Math: 5 cycles minimum to cross threshold.
challenges.verdict: REDUCED to 5.5 — latency is structurally bounded by EMA convergence and coactivation resistance

challenges.adversary_argument: Claude cannot see LTP status, edge tiers, interference events, dream replay artifacts, or fact decay trajectories. The system learns from Claude but Claude learns nothing about the system's state.
challenges.evidence: No API endpoint returns LTP status. ProactiveSurfacedMemory struct has no tier/ltp/interference fields.
challenges.verdict: REDUCED to 3.8 — Claude is structurally blind to memory health metrics that would change its behavior

correctness.evidence_code: RRF fusion formula is mathematically sound. Decay model well-grounded in Anderson & Schooler (1991). LTP thresholds calibrated against empirical patterns.
correctness.evidence_structural: 11-layer pipeline implements complete retrieval stack. Each layer has clear input/output contracts. No dead code paths.

robustness.evidence_code: Stale cache fallback on backend failure. Silent degradation warnings. 5s timeout with graceful abort.
robustness.evidence_structural: BLOCKER RISK: Interference detection silently degrades memories. No circuit breaker for feedback loop runaway. Coactivated misleading memories resist correction for 10-20 cycles.

security.evidence_code: strip_system_noise removes XML injection. API key validation on all endpoints. Content length limits (100KB).
security.evidence_structural: No PII handling, no authentication context leak. Emotional metadata is bounded (-1.0 to 1.0).

performance.evidence_code: Deferred embedding (50ms fast path). BM25 index for keyword search. Vamana for ANN search. LRU caches throughout.
performance.evidence_structural: 11-layer pipeline but each layer has early termination conditions. Cross-encoder only runs on top 20.

maintainability.evidence_code: 200+ constants in single file with documentation. Clear layer separation in semantic_retrieve.
maintainability.evidence_structural: Fractal consistency across scales aids comprehension. But importance formula is deeply buried and hard to override.

data_integrity.evidence_code: RocksDB persistence with WAL. Backup/restore system. SHA-256 dedup.
data_integrity.evidence_structural: BLOCKER RISK: 95% reasoning intent loss on FileAccess events. Auto-ingested memories lose RichContext, emotional signals, episode threading. Interference detection has no user-facing notification.

scalability.evidence_code: Vamana ANN scales to millions. RocksDB handles 500MB/user. LRU eviction for memory pressure.
scalability.evidence_structural: Tier system naturally manages memory volume. L1 edges auto-prune at 48h.

testability.evidence_code: Unit tests for RRF, decay, LTP. Integration test dataset infrastructure in tests/.
testability.evidence_structural: But no tests for Claude<->shodh coherence. No feedback loop integration tests. No interference detection tests.

extensibility.evidence_code: HybridSearchConfig is serde-serializable. Query struct has 25+ optional fields. MCP tool schemas are JSON.
extensibility.evidence_structural: rrf_k exposure pattern is clean and replicable for other parameters. OnceLock pattern for runtime config is sound.

compliance.evidence_code: No external data transmission. Local-first storage. No PII classification.
compliance.evidence_structural: Emotional metadata stored in plain text. No data retention policy enforcement.

coherence.evidence_code: Hook content ('Modified file: X') maps to importance=0.05. Claude's reasoning maps to nothing in shodh's scoring model. Entity relationships all become 'co-occurrence'. Feedback loop latency is 10-20x asymmetric.
coherence.evidence_structural: 20-dimensional interface has 5 ACTIVE, 3 NEWLY ACTIVE, 5 STATIC, 2 DORMANT, 5 INDIRECT dimensions. Over half the interface is non-functional or one-way.

usability.evidence_code: MCP tools have clear schemas. Hook is zero-config. rrf_k has descriptive documentation.
usability.evidence_structural: But Claude cannot observe memory health. Cannot distinguish fragile from consolidated memories. Cannot see interference events.

blockers: Data Integrity (4.5): 95% reasoning loss + auto-ingest loses RichContext + silent interference
Coherence (4.2): Structural mismatch between Claude's reasoning capability and shodh's scoring model

quality.notes: Pipeline is well-engineered. Decay model is state-of-art. But importance formula is structurally blind to reasoning intent.

completeness.notes: 9 of 20 interface dimensions are STATIC/DORMANT/INDIRECT. Claude's richest signals (reasoning, confidence, tradeoffs) have no encoding path.

performance.notes: Fast path 50ms. Deferred embedding. Good caching. Latency is in the feedback loop (5-15 cycles), not the pipeline.

utility.notes: Memories are surfaced but truncated to 120 chars. Claude sees 5-10% of stored content. Cannot distinguish critical from trivial.

coherence.notes: BLOCKER. Claude's behavioral space and shodh's parameter space are structurally misaligned at the intent layer.

cohesiveness.notes: Fractal consistency across scales is excellent. Trust cascade, decay cascade, learning rate cascade all self-similar.

elasticity.notes: rrf_k is newly exposed. LOG_PERIODIC_SCALES is now runtime. But 40+ hardcoded constants in the scoring pipeline.

function.notes: All three retrieval modes work. Feedback loop closes. Episode threading active. But hidden state prevents optimal behavior.

ease_of_use.notes: Zero-config hooks work. MCP tools have clear schemas. But no visibility into memory health, no diagnostic tools for Claude.

critical.title: Structured reasoning capture in hooks
critical.description: Replace 'Modified file: X' with structured payload including: (1) one-line summary of WHY the edit was made, (2) experience_type override from Claude's intent, (3) importance_hint for Claude to signal criticality
critical.impact: Fixes 95% reasoning loss. Importance formula can use Claude's classification.

critical.title: Memory health observability endpoint
critical.description: Add /api/memory/{id}/health returning: ltp_status, edge_tier, strength, decay_rate, interference_history, activation_pattern, time_to_prune_estimate
critical.impact: Claude can distinguish fragile from consolidated memories. Can prioritize reaccessing L1 edges before 48h expiry.

critical.title: Interference notification in retrieval stats
critical.description: When proactive_context stores a memory that triggers interference, include interference_events[] in response: [{old_memory_id, similarity, decay_applied}]
critical.impact: Claude knows when storing contradictory info. Can explicitly resolve conflicts.

high.title: Bidirectional feedback acceleration
high.description: When explicit negative signal detected ('wrong', 'not helpful'), apply immediate importance decay (not just EMA accumulation). Bypass 5-15 cycle latency for strong signals (confidence > 0.8).
high.impact: Reduces unlearning latency from 5-15 cycles to 1-2 cycles for explicit rejection.

high.title: Auto-ingest quality parity
high.description: Propagate episode_id, emotional_valence, and RichContext from the proactive_context request to auto-ingested memories. Currently auto-ingest creates bare Experience objects.
high.impact: Majority of stored memories gain episode threading and emotional context.

high.title: Dream replay edge tagging
high.description: Tag edges created by dream replay with source='dream_replay'. Expose in retrieval stats. Allow Claude to distinguish speculative from empirical associations.
high.impact: Prevents false memory trails from being treated as real associations.

high.title: Credibility field activation in hooks
high.description: Set credibility on remember calls based on source: user_input=0.9, tool_output=0.7, auto_ingest=0.5, error_output=0.4. Currently always None (defaults to 0.5).
high.impact: Activates dormant dimension #9. Interference resistance scales with source quality.

medium.title: Expose retrieval mode recommendation
medium.description: Add recommended_mode field to retrieval_stats based on query analysis. If query has 2+ entities and graph density < 1.0, suggest 'associative'. If temporal keywords, suggest 'hybrid' with recency_weight=0.5.
medium.impact: Claude can make informed mode selection instead of always defaulting to hybrid.

medium.title: Entity lookup failure feedback
medium.description: Return entity_resolution[] in retrieval stats: [{name, status: 'found'|'not_found'|'merged', resolved_to}]. Claude can reformulate queries when entities don't match.
medium.impact: Closes silent failure gap. Claude learns which entity names work.

medium.title: Semantic intent tags from Claude
medium.description: Add intent_tags[] to remember API: ['architectural-decision', 'security-fix', 'performance-optimization']. Map to importance boost in scoring formula.
medium.impact: Claude's strategic classification directly influences memory survival.

low.title: Dynamic rerank_count per query
low.description: Expose rerank_count (default 20) on recall API. For high-precision queries, rerank more candidates.

low.title: RRF K consistency audit
low.description: HybridSearchConfig.rrf_k=45 and Layer 4 default K=20.0 serve different purposes but create confusion. Document or unify.
